main.description: Submit the AT-URI and CID of a bid record directly to the RFP issuer, bypassing the firehose. Used when the RFP includes a submitBid service DID reference. Must be called via PDS service-proxying (atproto-proxy); the receiver verifies the inter-service auth JWT and requires its issuer to be the DID that authored the referenced bid record. The receiver additionally verifies the bid's badge.blue attestations (network.attested.signature): at least one inline signature must verify against the attestation CID recomputed for the record in its authoring repository — the same durable, replayable check applied to bids discovered via the firehose, where no service-auth JWT exists.

record.description: The bid record itself, including a strong reference to the RFP it is for.
